questions.question: 描述过去的客观存在，我们使用 There was 或 There were。
questions.explanation: There be句型根据描述的时间决定时态，过去用was/were。

questions.question: 'grass' 的意思是‘玻璃’。
questions.explanation: Grass是草地，玻璃是glass。

questions.question: I could not ride a bike before. 这里的 could not 代表过去的能力。
questions.explanation: could是can的过去式，表示过去的能力。

questions.question: the biggest 表示‘最大的’，双写了字母g。
questions.explanation: big是重读闭音节单词，最高级需双写末尾辅音字母再加est。

questions.question: ago 是描述‘现在’的时间标志词。
questions.explanation: ago意为‘以前’，是过去时的标志。

questions.question: There _____ no library in my school ten years ago.
questions.explanation: library是单数，ten years ago表示过去，用was。

questions.question: I didn't _____ like eggs before.
questions.explanation: didn't 后面接动词原形。

questions.question: The sun is the ______ star in our system.
questions.explanation: 形容词最高级前已有the，后面直接填hottest。

questions.question: My school was small ten years ago, but now it is ______.
questions.explanation: 句子用but转折，small的对比词应选large。

questions.question: How ______ did you change?
questions.explanation: How much 询问程度，表示“改变了多少”。

questions.question: What ______ you do last night?
questions.explanation: last night表示过去，疑问句借用助动词did。

questions.question: Now I ______ active in class.
questions.explanation: Now描述现在，I后面的人称代词用am。

questions.question: Who is the ______ girl in your class?
questions.explanation: 班级三者以上对比用最高级tallest。

questions.question: Before, I was short. Now, I am ______.
questions.explanation: 身高前后的对比，矮（short）对应高（tall）。

questions.question: People can see many stars in the ______ at night.
questions.explanation: 星星通常出现在天空（sky）中。

questions.question: You can play basketball in the ____.
questions.explanation: gym健身房/体育馆。

questions.question: Thirty years _____ , there were no computers in our class.
questions.explanation: ago意为…以前。

questions.question: Winter is the _____ season of the year in China.
questions.explanation: 冬天是一年中最冷的季节。

questions.question: I ____ thin two years ago. (用be动词填空)
questions.explanation: ago用过去时，I搭配was。

questions.question: 请将下列单词与对应的中文意思连线。
questions.explanation: grass草地，star星星，dream梦想，internet互联网。

questions.question: 请将短语与中文意思连线。
questions.explanation: look up查阅，tell a story讲故事，go cycling骑行，ice-skate滑冰。

questions.question: 连词成句：(was, no, library, There)
questions.explanation: There was no... 句型表示以前没有某物。

questions.question: 连词成句：(I, active, now, am)
questions.explanation: 主系表结构描述现在的状态。

exam.title: Unit 4 Then and now - Final Examination

questions.question: didn't 后面可以加 liked。
questions.explanation: 助动词didn't后接动词原形。

questions.question: 'dining hall' 指的是‘图书馆’。
questions.explanation: dining hall是食堂。

questions.question: easy 的最高级形式是 easiest。
questions.explanation: 辅音字母+y结尾的形容词变最高级，去y变i加est。

questions.question: couldn't 是 could not 的缩写。
questions.explanation: 考察单词缩写规则。

questions.question: 20 years ago, there was no Internet. 这句话符合历史事实。
questions.explanation: 20年前互联网在中国尚未普及。

questions.question: There _____ no gym in late 1990s.
questions.explanation: 过去的年份用过去时。

questions.question: The moon and the ____ are in the sky.
questions.explanation: stars 星星。

questions.question: The tiger is the _____ of the three animals. (big)
questions.explanation: 双写g加est。

questions.question: He _____ not like sports before.
questions.explanation: before表示过去。

questions.question: The cat is small, but the elephant is ____.
questions.explanation: small对比large。

questions.question: Which one is the _____ of all?
questions.explanation: of all表示范围，用最高级。

questions.question: We stay at home and study by ______.
questions.explanation: 借助电脑在线学习。

questions.question: I loved bread, ______ now I love rice.
questions.explanation: 前后喜好对比，用转折连词。

questions.question: My grandpa ______ play football many years ago.
questions.explanation: 表示过去没有的能力。

questions.question: There were no ______ in my old school.
questions.explanation: no后面通常接名词复数。

questions.question: I'm ______ I can't go to the party.
questions.explanation: I'm afraid 用于委婉表达。

questions.question: I looked ______ my old photos yesterday.
questions.explanation: look at 看着某物。

questions.question: Before, my mother had short hair, now she _____ long hair.
questions.explanation: now 表示现在时，主语she用has。

questions.question: In the race, I was not fast. I was ______.
questions.explanation: 不快即是慢。

questions.question: 连出对应关系。
questions.explanation: 时间与状态的词汇对应。

questions.question: 连出原级与最高级。
questions.explanation: fast-fastest, slow-slowest...

questions.question: 连词成句：(a, dream, I, had, tonight)
questions.explanation: 过去发生的事情用had。

questions.question: 连词成句：(is, school, changing, My, fast)
questions.explanation: 现在进行时描述正在发生的变化。

knowledge_summary.point: There be 句型时态转换
knowledge_summary.core_concept: 使用There was/were no表达过去没有某物，对比There is/are的现在状态。
knowledge_summary.key_formula: 过去: There was (单数名词) / There were (复数名词) + 时间状语(ago/last...)
common_mistakes: 混淆时态，如在ago句子中使用is/are
was/were与其后的名词单复数不匹配
knowledge_summary.tips: 标志词是关键：看到ago用过去，看到now用现在。

knowledge_summary.core_concept: 用于三者或更多事物中表达‘最...’的一项。
knowledge_summary.key_formula: the + 形容词最高级 (+ 范围词/名词)
common_mistakes: 双写词尾字母拼写错误(如bigest)
knowledge_summary.tips: 重读闭音节单词(如big, hot, fat)变最高级需双写末尾辅音字母。

knowledge_summary.point: 个人能力与爱好的时间对比
knowledge_summary.core_concept: 通过Before和Now两个时间段的描述呈现个人的成长与变化。
knowledge_summary.key_formula: Before, I/He/She + (didn't/couldn't) + 动词原形. Now, I/He/She + (love/like/am/can)...
common_mistakes: 现在时中第三人称单数漏掉s/es
knowledge_summary.tips: 描述过去时别忘了动词要变身，描述现在时注意主谓一致。
